flags.definition: A long pass that starts on one lateral side of the pitch (wing or half-space) and ends on the opposite side.
flags.heuristic: Pass where is_long_ball == true AND start_zone in {Left Wing, Left Half Space} with end_zone in {Right Wing, Right Half Space} (or reverse). Zone derived from y coordinate via _pitch_zone().
include_rules: is_long_ball == true
start lateral zone is left side (Left Wing or Left Half Space) and end lateral zone is right side (Right Wing or Right Half Space), or vice versa
exclude_rules: passes that stay on the same side of the pitch
passes through the centre (neither side qualifies as wing/half-space)
false_negatives: short switches through the lines â€” missed because gated on is_long_ball
flags.notes: Already implemented in whoscored_scraper._is_switch_of_play() and clipmaker_core fallback. UI wiring complete (filtering, pass maps, badge labels, NLP intent). Heuristic is intentionally strict â€” gated on is_long_ball to avoid counting short cross-pitch passes.

flags.definition: A pass played backwards or square from a wide/byline position into the penalty area for a runner arriving late.
flags.heuristic: Pass ending inside the box where end_x < start_x (backward component) and start_x >= 88 (near byline), with start_y in wide channel (outside central 18-yard zone).
include_rules: event type is Pass
start position near or at byline (x >= 88)
start position in wide channel (y <= 18 or y >= 62)
end position inside the box (end_x >= 88, end_y between 18 and 62)
pass has backward or square direction (end_x <= start_x)
exclude_rules: passes that end outside the box
forward passes from the byline (not cutbacks)

flags.definition: A long aerial or driven ball played diagonally across the pitch, typically to switch play or exploit space behind a defensive line.
flags.heuristic: Pass with distance >= 32m and lateral displacement (|end_y - start_y|) >= 20m, excluding crosses and set pieces.
include_rules: event type is Pass
pass length >= 32m
lateral displacement (|end_y - start_y|) >= 20m
pass height is High or Medium (aerial component)
significant forward or horizontal direction
exclude_rules: passes where lateral displacement is less than 20m (not diagonal enough)

flags.definition: Any pass â€” including crosses â€” that starts outside the penalty area and ends inside it during open play.
flags.heuristic: Pass where start is outside the box and end_x >= 88, 18 <= end_y <= 62, excluding set pieces.
include_rules: event type is Pass
start position is outside the box
end position is inside the box (end_x >= 88, 18 <= end_y <= 62)
includes crosses that land inside the box
includes ground, driven, and lofted passes
exclude_rules: passes that already start inside the box
false_positives: deflected passes that accidentally enter the box
false_negatives: passes to feet of a player standing just outside the line who immediately enters

flags.definition: A non-cross pass successfully completed within ~20m of the opponent's goal. Measures deliberate, structured final-third penetration â€” captures passes into the central corridor just outside and inside the box.
flags.heuristic: Completed pass where end_x >= 97 (approx 20m from goal on StatsBomb 120-unit pitch), excluding crosses and set pieces.
include_rules: event type is Pass
pass is complete (pass_outcome == null or 'Complete' depending on provider)
end_x >= 97
includes ground passes, driven passes, layoffs, cut-ins into central zone
includes passes to the box edge
false_positives: passes to a wide channel at x >= 97 that are not centrally meaningful â€” mitigated by reviewing end_y if needed
false_negatives: brilliant passes intercepted just before the recipient â€” excluded by design since incompleteness is a valid qualifier
flags.notes: Threshold: StatsBomb pitch = 120 units ~ 105m. 20m from goal => x >= 120 - (20/105 * 120) ~ 97. Direction is always toward opponent goal so keeper backpass false positive is geometrically impossible.

flags.definition: A carry where the player starts outside the penalty area and ends inside it during open play.
flags.heuristic: Carry where start is outside the box and carry_end_x >= 88, 18 <= carry_end_y <= 62.
include_rules: event type is Carry
start position is outside the box
end position is inside the box (carry_end_x >= 88, 18 <= carry_end_y <= 62)
exclude_rules: carries that start and end outside the box
carries that already start inside the box
false_positives: carry that crosses the box line but player is immediately dispossessed â€” geometrically qualifies but tactically irrelevant, hard to filter without carry outcome data
false_negatives: player carries to the exact box line and shoots or passes from there â€” carry ends at edge, not inside (threshold sensitivity of ~1 unit)
flags.notes: No set-piece exclusion needed â€” carries do not occur from set pieces.

flags.definition: A pass that starts outside the final third and ends inside it during open play.
flags.heuristic: Pass where x < 80 and end_x >= 80, excluding set pieces. Threshold aligns with app's existing depth_zone logic: x >= 67 on WhoScored 0-100 scale = x >= 80 on StatsBomb 120-unit pitch.
include_rules: event type is Pass
start position outside final third (x < 80)
end position inside final third (end_x >= 80)
includes long balls from defence landing in final third
includes switches ending in final third on far side
exclude_rules: passes that already start in the final third
false_positives: sideways pass on the exact x=80 boundary â€” practically negligible given pass tracking precision
false_negatives: pass to a player just shy of x=80 who enters the third in their next action
flags.notes: Overlaps with is_deep_completion intentionally â€” every deep completion (end_x >= 97) is also a final third entry (end_x >= 80), but not vice versa. Different granularities of the same concept.

flags.definition: A carry that starts outside the final third and ends inside it during open play.
flags.heuristic: Carry where x < 80 and carry_end_x >= 80. No set-piece exclusion needed.
include_rules: event type is Carry
start position outside final third (x < 80)
end position inside final third (carry_end_x >= 80)
exclude_rules: carries that start and end outside the final third
carries that already start in the final third
false_positives: carry that crosses x=80 but player is immediately dispossessed â€” geometrically qualifies, tactically irrelevant
false_negatives: player carries to exactly x=80 and plays a pass â€” carry ends on the boundary, not inside (threshold sensitivity of ~1 unit)
flags.notes: Mirror of is_final_third_entry_pass for carries. Threshold x >= 80 matches app depth_zone logic (WhoScored x >= 67 = StatsBomb x >= 80).

flags.definition: A pass moving the ball from the strong side (ball side, defence concentrated) to the weak side (far side, space available).
flags.heuristic: Requires either StatsBomb 360 freeze frame data or sequence-based inference (tracking prior event locations). Not reliably derivable from a single event row.
flags.notes: Skipped â€” weak side cannot be reliably inferred from standard event data alone. Revisit if 360 data becomes available or sequence-based heuristics are implemented.
